requirementCueLines: Once accepted into the Business School, finance students must complete the following courses for graduation.
30 credits from 300- and 400-level TFIN or TBECON courses. TBANLT 433 counts for the this option.
5 credits TBUS 400 Business Policy and Strategic Management
Elective credits to bring total to 180
